interpretation: No drug-related SAE was observed, but the upper 95% limit still permits about 54 events per 1,000 administrations. Causality attribution and trial selection limit generalization.
Yngwe reports procedure-related and unrelated SAEs at scheduled visits, but exact 0-7-day participant-level counts are unavailable; Raison reports no post-dose serious TEAEs.

outcome: Severe psychiatric/behavioral event requiring medical attention
interpretation: Raison reports one panic/paranoia case through day 9; Yngwe reports two persistent severe anxiety cases but not exact onset. Pooling would invent a common window.
Neither direct report provides complete arm-level participant counts in the prespecified windows. Author contact or participant-level data are required.

outcome: Death, ICU-level care, or organ support
interpretation: No such treatment-related event was reported, but the small denominator cannot establish rarity with useful precision.
